steps.title: Make the two-row table
steps.content: Use the starting value and rate directly. At birth, $x=0$ and the seal is $85$ cm long. One month later, the length is $85+3.2=88.2$ cm. Use those two points: $(0,85)$ and $(1,88.2)$.

steps.title: Write the linear model
steps.content: The starting value is the $y$-intercept, so $b=85$. The seal grows $3.2$ cm per month, so the slope is $m=3.2$. The model is $$y=3.2x+85.$$

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: The slope must be $3.2$ centimeters per month, and the starting value must be $85$ centimeters. The correct answer is the only one with both: $y=3.2x+85$. D is correct.
